impact: This advances checkbox-43 by locking the missing-information fixture contract to the process model so agents can only ask users for facts backed by a process requirement.
summary: Add a fixture-only mutation test for missing-information validation that rejects a requested user fact without a linked process requirement.
target_task: Task checkbox-48: Task checkbox-43: Add one mutation test proving missing-information validation rejects a requested user fact that has no linked process requirement.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
